summary: Use HomeKit Device to bring HomeKit accessories into Home Assistant, and HomeKit Bridge to send selected Home Assistant entities back to Apple Home. Learn the clean architecture, the Matter alternative, and the setup gotchas that trip people up.

title: Home Assistant HomeKit Device vs HomeKit Bridge: Which Should You Use?
